summary: The repository provides a controlled outline-to-investigation workflow, but its Codex package is five separately registered skills backed by a globally configured researcher agent and PyYAML.

workflow_model.value: Five phases: create an outline, add items, add fields, run per-item deep research, and generate a report. Human confirmation is used around scope and batches.

value: multi-agent and live web search support

integration_decision.value: Merge the five phases into one deep-research skill. Replace YAML and global agent registration with a workspace JSON schema, the shared skill-tree CLI, and runtime-native bounded agents.

sources.title: Deep Research Skill 中文说明
